finding.citation: Production of a potential multistrain probiotic in co-culture conditions using agro-industrial by-products-based medium for fish nutrition.. BMC biotechnology. 2023. PMID: 38102630
finding.relevance:
This highlights the importance of selecting appropriate yeast strains with native biosynthetic capabilities.
